Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze repeated activities within each case. Activities list: Initiate Request, Verify Documents, Call Customer, Submit Additional, Adjust Account, Approve Request.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Repeating ones: Verify Documents appears multiple times in C001 positions: after Initiate, after Submit Additional, in C002 only once Actually C002 has Verify Docs only once at start. C003 has Verify Docs twice after Initiate, after Adjust Account. So Verify Docs appears multiple times in C001 and C003. Call Customer appears multiple times in each case: C001 appears once Actually C001: Call Customer once after Verify Docs first; C002: Call Customer appears twice first outbound call to clarify account discrepancy, then follow-up call; C003: Call Customer appears once call to have them return. So Call Customer repeats in C002 only. Adjust Account appears in C002 and C003 each once Actually C002 Adjust Account once, C003 Adjust Account once. So no repeats within a case for Adjust Account. Submit Additional appears only in C001.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus need to rename Verify Documents and Call Customer where they appear multiple times in same case.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For each case, we need to give context-specific names.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case C001: Verify Documents 1 initial verification of identity documents after Initiate Request, before first call. Context: initial identity verification. Verify Documents 2 re-check after customer submitted additional ID scan after Submit Additional. Context: verification after receiving missing docs. Thus rename perhaps: Initial Document Verification and Post-Submission Document Verification.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case C003: Verify Documents 1 initial verification of physical ID at branch after Initiate Request walk-in. Context: physical verification. Verify Documents 2 re-verification after account adjustment after Adjust Account. Context: verification after internal correction. Thus rename: Branch ID Verification initial and Post-Adjustment Document Verification.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case C002 Call Customer repeats: Call Customer 1 outbound call to clarify account discrepancy after initial Verify Docs. Context: clarification call. Call Customer 2 followup call to confirm adjustments after Adjust Account. Context: confirmation call. Thus rename: Clarification Call to Customer and Confirmation Call After Adjustment.

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Also note C001 Call Customer appears only once: verification incomplete, agent calls to request missing docs. Could rename to Missing Document Request Call. But since its not repeated within case, not strictly required to rename, but we can still rename for clarity. However task: Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case... So only need rename recurring ones. But we can also rename non-recurring for clarity, but not necessary.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus produce revised event log with renamed activities. Will present table similar. Also brief justification. Lets craft answer.
